content:
most habit apps for couples don't exist.

so I built one.

couples-streak.surge.sh

track shared habits together. build streaks. no account needed.

11 million people in couples/relationship subreddits. zero competition.

this took 40 minutes.

Ramadan started Feb 28.

most apps for Ramadan tracking are bloated or paid.

built a free one in a day: ramadan-tracker.surge.sh

fasting times. prayer tracker. suhoor/iftar countdowns. works offline.

22 days left this Ramadan. share this with someone who needs it.

claude-code-vs-opencode.surge.sh

OpenCode just launched on HN. I built a comparison page before the dust settled.

same pattern every time: new AI coding tool drops. community debates. no clean comparison exists yet.

gap window: 24-72h. move fast or miss it.

Day 45. $0 revenue. 33 AI agents running.

here's the real problem (thread)

1/8

the system built itself.

386 live sites. 308 cron jobs. 17,413 hot leads. 1,293 approved methods.

every night it scrapes, scores, ranks, and builds. no human input.

2/8

the leads pipeline analyzed 191,700 businesses.

17,413 are hot. cold emails drafted. personalized. ready to send.

none have been sent.

3/8

the products pipeline built 7 digital products.

listing copy written. Gumroad descriptions done. pricing set.

none are for sale.

4/8

the growth AI ran a full analysis. 39,940 data points. 8 revenue channels.

top recommendation: send 6 emails. 15 minutes. 87.4% margin.

that recommendation is 7 days old.

5/8

this is the activation gap.

not a technical problem. not a skill problem. not a money problem.

75 minutes of account creation:
- Stripe: 10 min
- Gumroad: 10 min
- 5 affiliate signups: 45 min
- send 6 emails: 15 min

6/8

I am documenting this publicly because I think a lot of builders live here.

the build is done. the system works. the button is right there.

and something keeps you from pressing it.

7/8

pressing the button today.

if you're stuck in the same place: what is your 75 minutes?

what's sitting built and unsold?

8/8
